title: Backported Copper Stuff
body:
# Backported Copper Stuff
Backported Copper Stuff is a utility mod that introduces copper equipment to Minecraft versions where it isn't natively available. This mod bridges the gear gap between stone and iron, providing a viable and aesthetic alternative for your early-game adventures.

# ⚔️ Mod Content

Full Armor Set: Copper helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots.

Tools & Weapons: Copper sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, and hoe.

Balanced Gameplay: Statistics (durability and efficiency) are specifically tuned to sit between stone and iron tiers.

Vanilla Friendly: Uses native copper ingots (or those added by the mod if required) to ensure a seamless integration with your world.

# 📥 Why use this mod?

Copper is often abundant but underutilized for survival. This mod provides an immediate use for your ore at the start of your journey, allowing you to save your precious iron for more complex machinery or late-game items.

[![Avaible On CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27bf3c97f9c1cd1a472dedcc7ec816604ad6ab9d_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backported-copper-stuff)
